patterns.message: Supabase clients are not allowed in pure logic packages. Use dependency injection instead.
Direct database clients are not allowed in pure logic packages. Use dependency injection instead.
HTTP server frameworks are not allowed in pure logic packages. This is business logic only.
File system operations are not allowed in pure logic packages. Use dependency injection instead.
Discord client is not allowed in pure logic packages. Use dependency injection instead.
Node.js I/O modules are not allowed in pure logic packages. Use dependency injection instead.

no-restricted-globals.name: process
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct access to process is not allowed in pure logic. Use configuration injection instead.

no-restricted-globals.name: Buffer
no-restricted-globals.message: Direct Buffer usage should be avoided in pure logic. Use typed data structures instead.
